$comment: Normative IntentProof source tree: https://github.com/IntentProof/intentproof-spec/tree/main/schema — $id is a logical URI; see README.
title: IntentProof WrapOptions v1

intent.description: Default natural-language intent for wrapped executions when the call site does not override it.

action.description: Default operation identifier (often dotted like vendor.service.method); SDKs MAY derive from the callable when omitted.

captureInputs.description: When false, inputs MUST be serialized as an empty object {}.

captureOutput.description: When false and status is ok, output MUST be null.

captureError.description: When true, failures MUST populate error; when false with captureOutput semantics, see semantics/wrap_behavior.md.

captureStack.description: When false, error.stack MUST be null on emitted events.

propagateCorrelation.description: When true, nested wraps inherit the active correlationId.

attributes.description: Static attributes merged into each emitted ExecutionEvent.attributes.

exporterTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time an exporter hook may block the wrap boundary; 0 means SDK default.
